texto: Forgiveness is a clean lotion that heals the wounds of misunderstandings! To iron out the differences
autor: get the painful sores dressed up

To iron out the differe…” articula reflexao, forgive-and-forget, forgiveness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
